today_news.title: Meta tests AI-powered shopping search to compete with ChatGPT and Gemini
today_news.summary: Meta is testing a shopping research feature in its Meta AI chatbot designed to compete with similar tools from OpenAI's ChatGPT and Google's Gemini.

today_news.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.3 Instant for smoother everyday conversations and better search
today_news.summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.3 Instant. The model is designed to respond more naturally and hallucinate less, especially when using web search.

today_news.title: The Download: The startup that says it can stop lightning, and inside OpenAI’s Pentagon deal
today_news.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires Startup Skyward Wildfire says it can prevent catastrophic fires...

today_news.title: Federal AI shakeup: State Department swaps Claude for aging GPT-4.1
today_news.summary: Several US federal agencies are already dropping Anthropic's AI products and switching to competitors like OpenAI.

today_news.title: Google's fastest and cheapest model Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite got smarter but also tripled the price
today_news.summary: Google Deepmind has released a preview of Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, the fastest and cheapest model in the Gemini 3 series. It's significantly more capable than its predecessor, but output costs have more than tripled.

today_news.title: This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires
today_news.summary: On June 1, 2023, as a sweltering heat wave baked Quebec, thousands of lightning strikes flashed across the province, setting off more than 120 wildfires. today_news.title: Meta sends private AI glasses footage to Kenya with few safeguards - and Europe's privacy regulators may come knocking
today_news.summary: To improve the AI in Meta's smart headset, data workers in Nairobi sift through private recordings from Western households. These include nude scenes, sex videos and bank details.

today_tech.title: Whisper-RIR-Mega: A Paired Clean-Reverberant Speech Benchmark for ASR Robustness to Room Acoustics
today_tech.summary: Abstract: We introduce Whisper-RIR-Mega, a benchmark dataset of paired clean and reverberant speech for evaluating automatic speech recognition (ASR) robustness to room acoustics. Each sample pairs a clean LibriSpeech utterance with the same utterance convolved with a real room impulse response from...

today_tech.title: RO-N3WS: Enhancing Generalization in Low-Resource ASR with Diverse Romanian Speech Benchmarks
today_tech.summary: Abstract: We introduce RO-N3WS, a benchmark Romanian speech dataset designed to improve generalization in automatic speech recognition (ASR), particularly in low-resource and out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions. RO-N3WS comprises over 126 hours of transcribed audio collected from broadcast news, li...

today_tech.title: Quality of Automatic Speech Recognition -- Polish Language case study -- from Wav2Vec to Scribe ElevenLabs
today_tech.summary: Abstract: This article concerns comparative studies on the Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model incorporated with the Large Language Model (LLM) used for medical interviews. today_tech.title: TraderBench: How Robust Are AI Agents in Adversarial Capital Markets?
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Evaluating AI agents in finance faces two key challenges: static benchmarks require costly expert annotation yet miss the dynamic decision-making central to real-world trading, while LLM-based judges introduce uncontrolled variance on domain-specific tasks. today_tech.title: How Well Do Multimodal Models Reason on ECG Signals?
today_tech.summary: Abstract: While multimodal large language models offer a promising solution to the "black box" nature of health AI by generating interpretable reasoning traces, verifying the validity of these traces remains a critical challenge.
